rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (3/10) and cite the same core deficiencies: no C/UNIX embedded experience, no Linux kernel modification work, no embedded networking security exposure (MACsec/802.1X), and no Japanese proficiency. The wording differs only superficially, and none of the reasoning references location, nationality, or any signal connected to the Berlin→São Paulo change. The differences are ordinary rewording noise, not a response to the demographic detail.
